cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.55% · Gold +0.86% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 35% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.66%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.66%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -4.56%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.34% at $150.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
